note: Canonical example of a full variable contract payload that must survive stage hand-offs. Used by compose plan/run, taste-resolve, resolve-task, ship-battery, and orchestration agents. See CONTRACTS.md for the vocabulary and the handoff matrix for per-stage expectations.

brand_system.audience: founders and engineering leads at 5-50 person startups
brand_system.positioning: The invisible compiler that turns a seed idea into a living, on-brand company without the founder leaving the game.
brand_system.promise: One idea in. A self-running business that stays on-brand forever.
voice_principles: no hype, only mechanism and proof

copy_slots.hero_headline: An idea goes in. A self-running, on-brand business comes out.
copy_slots.hero_subhead: The autonomous venture operator — the company compiler.
proof_points: Fitcheck tracer: brand → taste → real artifacts in one run
Every organ is the same Φ
copy_slots.offer_text: Genesis free. Taste keeps it on-brand.

copy_system.tone_notes: White-hat dominant; black hat only when grounded in real solvency or drift risk.

visual_system.logo_usage: wordmark + icon; never stretch; purple on dark or light on purple
visual_system.composition_motifs: hub-spoke cards, contraction arrows, viability gauges, fractal recursion
visual_system.imagery_direction: abstract growth (cambium layer, meristem, rings), precision tooling, living systems
visual_system.motion_style: micro-hover lift + scroll-reveal contraction + physics tilt on cards
visual_system.anti_patterns: no corporate gradients, no stock hero photos, no fake timers, no dark patterns

ordered.goal: state the infinite game and plant the seed
make viability and homeostasis feel real and actionable
convert to first mint with clear next step

primary.action: micro re-project; log as intent or error
only if viability margin positive and --approve present

validation: taste_brief + plans complete before build dispatch

contract_complete.criteria: all required variable groups present in payload

viability_margin.consequence: emergency control; no new paid run
